groups.title: Qwen 3
groups.summary: Compact Qwen 3 picks for everyday chat on tighter memory budgets.

models.title: Qwen 3 (0.6B)
models.summary: The lightest option in this family. Best when you care most about install size and speed.

models.title: Qwen 3 (1.7B)
models.summary: A small but more usable daily model than 0.6B. Good for lightweight on-device chat.

groups.title: LFM 2.5
groups.summary: Small Liquid AI models that stay lightweight while covering chat, reasoning, Japanese, and vision use cases.

models.title: LFM 2.5 (1.2B Instruct)
models.summary: A lightweight general chat model focused on fast on-device instruction following.

models.title: LFM 2.5 (1.2B Thinking)
models.summary: A small reasoning-oriented variant for users who want more deliberate answers without leaving the lightweight tier.

models.title: LFM 2.5 (1.2B JP)
models.summary: A Japanese-focused variant for users who want better Japanese handling in a compact local model.

models.title: LFM 2.5 VL (1.6B)
models.summary: A compact vision-language model for image-aware prompts while staying in the lightweight local range.

groups.title: Translate Gemma
groups.summary: A translation-focused pick for users who work across languages often.

models.title: Translate Gemma (4B)
models.summary: A focused model for translation-heavy workflows, especially when you care more about multilingual handling than broad general chat quality.
